chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-686 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.3228/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.1 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.3229/2026. 4. For orders on Misc. No.3230/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 10.02.2026. Qadir Khan Mandokhail, Petitioner in person. ------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The Petitioner is an Advocate and a former Member of the National Assembly of Pakistan, who has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, arraying the Pakistan Civil Aviation Authority and five airlines operating in the country as Respondents, alleging that those operators are engaging in cartelization so as to implement predatory pricing models, resulting in inflated airfares to the detriment of passengers. He seeks that directions be issued to the PCAA and the Competition Commission of Pakistan to probe the issue and take appropriate remedial action. Having considered the matter, we have observed that the Petitioner has not approached either regulatory body in the matter prior to filing this Petition, nor even impleaded the latter, albeit the subject ostensibly falling within its domain. As such, the Petition is found to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly, along with the pending Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
